label: Instruction
description: Defines a single tutorial instruction shown to the player during a lesson. Each instruction has an initiation event tag that starts it, optional end tags that dismiss it, and optional allowed-action tags that filter what the player can do while it is active.

instructionClass.label: Instruction class
instructionClass.description: C# Lesson_Instruction subclass that drives this instruction's progress tracking and completion logic. Defaults to Instruction_Basic, which completes when eventTagsEnd fires. Mods can add custom subclasses.

text.label: Text
text.description: Localized instruction text shown in the tutorial HUD panel. Required by ConfigErrors. Supports input binding tokens such as {Key:TogglePause} and positional format placeholders such as {0}.
examples: Click the colonist to select them.

textController.label: Text (controller)
textController.description: Optional controller- or Steam Deck-specific alternative to text. The runtime property Text returns this value when a gamepad is active.

startCentered.label: Start centered
startCentered.description: If true, the tutorial HUD panel starts in the center of the screen instead of its normal anchored position.

tutorialModeOnly.label: Tutorial mode only
tutorialModeOnly.description: If true, this instruction is skipped unless the player is in tutorial mode. Source default is true, so it is absent from most shipped XML.

eventTagInitiate.label: Event tag (initiate)
eventTagInitiate.description: Tutor event tag string that triggers this instruction to become active. Required by ConfigErrors. This is a plain string identifier, not a def reference.

eventTagInitiateSource.label: Event tag (initiate source)
eventTagInitiateSource.description: Another InstructionDef whose eventTagInitiate value is reused as this instruction's initiation tag. Used to chain or share event tags between instructions.

eventTagsEnd.label: Event tags (end)
eventTagsEnd.description: Tutor event tag strings that dismiss this instruction when fired. Each entry is a plain string identifier matching a tutor event tag in game code or mods.

actionTagsAllowed.label: Action tags allowed
actionTagsAllowed.description: Tutor action or event tag strings the player is permitted to perform while this instruction is active. Any action not in this list triggers rejectInputMessage. Each entry is a plain string identifier.

rejectInputMessage.label: Reject input message
rejectInputMessage.description: Localized message shown to the player when they attempt an action not in actionTagsAllowed while this instruction is active.
examples: You cannot do that during this tutorial step.

concept.label: Concept
concept.description: ConceptDef taught to the player when this instruction is activated. The learning readout for the concept is shown alongside the instruction text.

highlightTags.label: Highlight tags
highlightTags.description: UI element highlight tag strings pulsed on screen while this instruction is active. These are plain string identifiers, not def references.

onMapInstruction.label: On-map instruction
onMapInstruction.description: Localized text drawn directly on the map surface for spatial tutorial instructions that require the player to look at a specific location.

targetCount.label: Target count
targetCount.description: Numeric progress target used by certain Lesson_Instruction subclasses (such as Instruction_BuildNearRoom) to track how many objects must be built, created, or interacted with before completion.

thingDef.label: Thing def
thingDef.description: ThingDef used by instruction subclasses that require a specific thing to be built, placed, or interacted with to complete.

recipeDef.label: Recipe def
recipeDef.description: RecipeDef that the player must add to a bill at a production bench to complete the Instruction_AddBill step.

recipeTargetCount.label: Recipe target count
recipeTargetCount.description: Number of times the recipe must be added to bills for the instruction to count as complete.

giveOnActivateDef.label: Give on activate (def)
giveOnActivateDef.description: ThingDef spawned and given to the player's colony when this instruction becomes active. Only spawned when giveOnActivateCount is greater than zero.

giveOnActivateCount.label: Give on activate (count)
giveOnActivateCount.description: Stack count of giveOnActivateDef to spawn when this instruction activates. A value of zero or less disables the spawn.

endTutorial.label: End tutorial
endTutorial.description: If true, the tutorial session ends after this instruction is deactivated.

resetBuildDesignatorStuffs.label: Reset build designator stuffs
resetBuildDesignatorStuffs.description: If true, the build designator's stuff-material selection is reset to default when this instruction activates. Used to prevent the tutorial from being blocked by an unusual material choice.

basic-instruction.label: Basic instruction
basic-instruction.description: A simple tutorial instruction that activates on one event tag and ends on another.

build-instruction.label: Build instruction
build-instruction.description: A tutorial instruction that requires the player to build a specific thing to complete.
